Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-02 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Dashboard Today's data shows two exceptionally strong performers at the top of the momentum rankings. SEDG ranks #1 with a composite score of 92.0, driven by outstanding 1-year returns of 339.59% and near-perfect ratio consistency (4 of 5 ratio passes), while maintaining all four SMA gates—indicating a sustained uptrend across all timeframes. VPG follows closely behind with even more extreme absolute returns (416.84% over 1 year and 289.37% over 6 months), though its lower ratio pass count (3 of 5) suggests slightly less consistent acceleration across timeframes. Notably, SEDG shows superior resilience on bad SPY days with a score of 0.5772 compared to VPG's 4.9774, meaning SEDG's gains were more decoupled from broader market downturns. Both tickers are trading well above their 200-day moving averages and demonstrate strong outperformance versus SPY and QQQ across multiple time horizons. The dashboard appears to be identifying a narrow set of large-cap growth names with exceptional recent momentum rather than a broad-based market strength signal.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
